div.h3: Thread 1's CAS succeeds on recycled memory

ul.li: The Comparison: Thread 1's CAS compares the memory address, not the content or a version tag.
Memory Recycling: Node A was freed and Node X was allocated at that exact same address.
False Positive: CAS succeeds because current_top (X @ addr A) == old_top (A).
Corruption: Thread 1 installs B as the new top, but B was already freed and potentially overwritten.

g.text: Stack Layout: A → B → C → NULL
